zh.Carnarvon Castle, Caernarvonshire, Wales: 威爾士凱爾納方史爾卡納福 卡素
zh.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I於1235年出生在英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德時，他的父親Roger de Macclesfield26歲，母親Isabel de Orreby19歲。他與Countess Millicent Hanmer在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1310年在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年75歲。

zh-hans.Carnarvon Castle, Caernarvonshire, Wales: 威尔士凱爾納方史爾卡納福 卡素
zh-hans.Macclesfield, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I于1235年出生在英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德时，他的父亲Roger de Macclesfield26岁，母亲Isabel de Orreby19岁。他与Countess Millicent Hanmer在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1310年在英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Macclesfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Maxfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Macclesfield in Cheshire. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Maccel (genitive Macceles) + Old English feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I was born in 1235, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, his father, Roger de Macclesfield, was 26 and his mother, Isabel de Orreby, was 19. He married Countess Millicent Hanmer in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1310, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I est né en 1235, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Macclesfield, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Orreby, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Countess Millicent Hanmer à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1310, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I 1235 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Macclesfield 26 und seine Mutter Isabel de Orreby 19. Er hat in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Countess Millicent Hanmer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1310 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I è nato il nel 1235 nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Macclesfield, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Orreby, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Countess Millicent Hanmer nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1310, nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Earl Thomas de Macclesfield Iが1235年にイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで生まれた時，父Roger de Macclesfieldは26歳，母Isabel de Orrebyは19歳であった。イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでCountess Millicent Hanmerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1310年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I(이)가 1235년 영국 체실르 맥클스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Macclesfield(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Orreby(은)는 19세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Countess Millicent Hanmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I nasceu em 1235, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Macclesfield, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Orreby, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess Millicent Hanmer em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1310, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I родился в 1235 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Macclesfield было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Orreby, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Millicent Hanmer в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1310 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Earl Thomas de Macclesfield I nació en 1235, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Macclesfield, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel de Orreby, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Countess Millicent Hanmer en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1310, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
